name: Chicken-Mushroom Risotto
recipeIngredient: 1 medium Carrot OR 1 small red pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 3-quart saucepan over medium-high heat, melt 1 tablespoon Margarine or butter. Cook the chicken until browned, stirring often. Remove and set aside.
2. Add the remaining Margarine or butter to the pan. Reduce the heat to medium. Cook the onion, carrot, and rice until the rice is lightly browned, stirring constantly.
3. Stir in the broth, soup, and pepper. Bring to a boil. Reduce the heat to low. Cover and cook for 15 minutes, stirring occasionally.
4. Add the peas and reserved chicken. Cover and cook for an additional 5 minutes or until the chicken is no longer pink, the rice is tender, and the liquid has been absorbed, stirring occasionally.
5. Serve. Makes about 4-1/2 cups or 4 servings.
